# NAI TALK

NAI TALK builds and hosts websites for Nigerian businesses, schools, churches and NGOs, and provides the domains, hosting, business email and ongoing website care that keep them online. Based in Lagos, Nigeria.

## Services

- [Website Design](https://www.naitalk.com/website-design) — custom business, e-commerce, school, church and NGO websites
- [Website Care Plans](https://www.naitalk.com/website-care-plans) — ongoing hosting, security, backups and support for an existing website
- [Web Hosting](https://www.naitalk.com/web-hosting) — fast, secure hosting with SSL, email and backups included
- [Business Email Hosting](https://www.naitalk.com/business-email-hosting) — professional info@yourbusiness.com addresses
- [SEO Services](https://www.naitalk.com/seo-services) — on-page, content and local SEO
- [Domains](https://www.naitalk.com/domains) — search, register, transfer and manage domain names

## More

- [Blog](https://www.naitalk.com/blog) — guides on domains, hosting, website design and running a business online in Nigeria
- [Portfolio](https://www.naitalk.com/portfolio) — websites and projects NAI TALK has built
- [About](https://www.naitalk.com/about)
- [Contact](https://www.naitalk.com/contact)
